title: Licensing by reciprocity
doc_html:
§3212.  Licensing by reciprocity

The board shall issue a license without examination to persons who are licensed as radiologic technologists under the laws of other states provided that the standards under which they were licensed are at least as stringent as those established by the board.  

Acts 1984, No. 485, §1.
doc_text:
§3212.  Licensing by reciprocity
The board shall issue a license without examination to persons who are licensed as radiologic technologists under the laws of other states provided that the standards under which they were licensed are at least as stringent as those established by the board.
Acts 1984, No. 485, §1.
